COMPOUND - Enum constant in enum class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.TagType
Represents a map-like collection of named Tags.
CompoundTag - Class in me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Represents an NBT compound tag that contains a collection of Tags.
CompoundTag() - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.CompoundTag
Constructs a new unnamed tag with the specified value.y
CompoundTag(String) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.CompoundTag
Constructs a new tag with the specified name and value.
contains(String) - Method in class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.CompoundTag
Check whether the key exists in the Map or not.
createByType(TagType) - Static method in enum class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.TagType
Creates a new, instance of a Tag corresponding to the specified TagType with its corresponding value and empty name.
